scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @dossier/shared build && pnpm --filter @dossier/storage build && pnpm --filter @dossier/compute build && concurrently --names storage,compute,client --prefix-colors cyan,yellow,magenta "pnpm --filter @dossier/storage dev" "pnpm --filter @dossier/compute dev" "pnpm --filter @dossier/client dev"
scripts.build:services: pnpm --filter @dossier/shared build && pnpm --filter @dossier/storage build && pnpm --filter @dossier/compute build
